Hi i'm Abakpa Israel

Full-Stack Developer

Hi, I'm a passionate web developer who loves turning ideas into modern and responsive websites. I enjoy creating clean user interfaces, solving problems with code, and building projects that deliver great user experiences. From front-end design to database integration, I'm committed to learning and growing as a full-stack developer.

View My Projects

Skills

I am an aspiring full-stack web developer passionate about creating responsive websites and practical digital solutions. With experience in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL, and GitHub, I enjoy building projects that strengthen my skills and solve real-world problems. I am dedicated to continuous learning and committed to growing into a professional software developer.

Html 95% CSS 85% JavaScript 70%

Web Development

I create modern, responsive, and user-friendly websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. My focus is on building clean layouts, smooth navigation, and mobile-friendly designs that provide an excellent user experience across all devices.

Responsive Design

I create websites that adapt seamlessly to all screen sizes, including mobile phones, tablets, laptops, and desktops. Using responsive layouts and media queries, I ensure every website looks professional and works perfectly on any device.

Database & SQL Management

I design and manage databases using SQL and database management tools. This includes creating tables, storing records, updating data, and building efficient database structures for web applications and management systems.

Website Deployment & Version Control

I help bring projects online by deploying websites using platforms like GitHub and Netlify. I also use Git for version control, allowing projects to be managed, updated, and maintained professionally.

About Me

I am an aspiring full-stack web developer passionate about building responsive websites and practical digital solutions. I enjoy creating clean user interfaces, solving problems with code, and continuously improving my skills in modern web technologies.
